title: 30o: compute_sha256_hex uppercase+lowercase mismatch unexplained
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/blob.rs lines 189-198: compute_sha256_hex calls hex_digit (which emits uppercase A-F) and then chains .to_lowercase(). There is no comment explaining why the uppercase path is used and then lowercased, rather than using a lowercase digit path directly. A reader must trace through hex_digit to understand the output is lowercase. Add a comment explaining the choice, or unify the encoding so .to_lowercase() is not needed.
